title: WinWeapons Patches
description: Allows you to play WinWeapons on neoforge
body:
**You can experience the amazing WinWeapons on Neoforge with the Sinytra connector**

WinWeapons adds 4 unique weapons, based on viewer weapon ideas:

The Winning Hand, a weapon that throws out a random card from four choices, with each suit doing a different effect. Effects include decreased knockback resistance and fall damage, regeneration blocking, inverted keyboard and mouse controls, and being tethered in place, unable to move. There is a rare chance for the next card to be a joker, dealing additional damage and inflicting all four effects.

The Heavy Brick, a throwable brick.

The Crystal Pistol, a revolver that fires amethyst shards, buds, and clusters, with buds and clusters having explosive properties (they do not destroy blocks). The pistol reloads incrementally, and is able to pull ammunition from the inventory or have it manually inserted like a bundle. Gunpowder can be manually inserted in order to fire a blank.

The Domain Sword, a longsword with stats similar to netherite and increased sword sweep range, which can charge up a rift that creates a domain, slowing the tick rate of other entities caught inside of it and affecting them with a visual shader. The user will be immune to the tick slowdown, and any affected entities will glow for them.

Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iWf20ORy8mg
